summary: Verified Memory Profile CRUD endpoints and Profile Drawer UI. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Profile Drawer memory controls work correctly - save personal fact, edit, move between bins, and delete all function without crashing.
test_credentials: No credentials required - using michael@example.com as default user context
seed_data_creation: Created test memories with TEST_ prefix during testing (TEST_UI_fact_my_favorite_color_is_blue, TEST_action_test_memory_for_move, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Memory Profile CRUD fully verified. Backend endpoints: GET /api/caos/memory (with bin_name filter), POST /api/caos/memory/save, PATCH /api/caos/memory/{memory_id}, DELETE /api/caos/memory/{memory_id} all working. Frontend Profile Drawer (accessed via Models button) has persistent memory controls section with save personal fact/working memory inputs and Edit/Move/Delete actions on each memory item.

backend_memory_crud.GET /api/caos/memory: Lists all profile memories, supports bin_name filter (personal_facts, general)
backend_memory_crud.POST /api/caos/memory/save: Saves memories with content, bin_name, tags, priority. Returns MemoryEntry with id, source=user_saved
backend_memory_crud.PATCH /api/caos/memory/{memory_id}: Updates content, bin_name (move between bins), tags, priority. Returns 404 for non-existent memory
backend_memory_crud.DELETE /api/caos/memory/{memory_id}: Removes memory entry. Returns {ok: true, deleted_id}. Returns 404 for non-existent memory

frontend_profile_drawer.location: Opened via Models button in left rail
frontend_profile_drawer.persistent_memory_controls: Section with 'Save a personal fact' and 'Save a working memory' inputs
frontend_profile_drawer.personal_facts_list: Shows personal_facts bin memories with Edit, Move to memory, Delete buttons
frontend_profile_drawer.working_memory_list: Shows general bin memories with Edit, Promote to fact, Delete buttons
frontend_profile_drawer.edit_action: Opens browser prompt to edit memory content
frontend_profile_drawer.move_to_memory_action: Moves personal fact to general bin (working memory)
frontend_profile_drawer.promote_to_fact_action: Moves working memory to personal_facts bin

frontend: Profile drawer opens via Models button
Profile information displays correctly (email, environment, assistant, threads, memories)
Save personal fact input and button work
Save working memory input and button work
Personal facts list displays with Edit/Move/Delete buttons
Working memory list displays with Edit/Promote/Delete buttons
Move to memory action works without crash
Promote to fact action works without crash
